title: Standardized Directory Structure
text: Standardized Directory Structure Runtime objects are always stored in a fixed directory structure, whether that is in a compilation output directory or a deployed Uniface archive file. Although an application may have several resource locations, which may contain different type of objects, the names of the directories for the objects in those locations must conform to these names.
